meaning: [药]金刚(烷)胺,三环癸胺(抗病毒药)
examples: Sometimes called "triple therapy", it involves the addition of 100 mg of amantadine twice a day.
There is also hope that two older generic drugs, amantadine and rimantadine, might be effective against bird flu.
Doctors have long known that amantadine treatment causes abnormal changes in the cornea in some Parkinson's patients.
Older medications such as amantadine are no longer effective, and common folk remedies such as oscillococcinum are useless.
The nonstimulant amantadine has been used to great advantage in treating ADD, as has bupropion (Wellbutrin) and the newest nonstimulant, Strattera.
